name: omegaprompt
summary: Provider-neutral prompt calibration engine with sensitivity-ranked meta-axes, hard-gate x soft-score fitness, walk-forward ship gates, guarded/expedition profiles, and explicit capability/risk reporting across Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini placeholder, and local OpenAI-compatible backends. Optional sub-tools (mini-omega-lock, mini-antemortem-cli) distribute separately and plug in via the omegaprompt.preflight interface.
author: hibou04-ops
